kw.name: Criar Sessao e Preparar Usuario de Teste
Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=vidaativa, url=http://localhost:3000/api, headers={}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=False, debug=0
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST On Session
kw.msg: POST Request : url=http://localhost:3000/api/usuarios/login path_url=/api/usuarios/login headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.34.2', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '58', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"email": "t20.teste@vidaativa.com", "senha": "123456789"}'
kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Get From Dictionary
kw.doc: Returns a value from the given ``dictionary`` based on the given ``key``.

kw.name: Get From Dictionary
kw.doc: Returns a value from the given ``dictionary`` based on the given ``key``.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: GET On Session
kw.msg: GET Response : url=http://localhost:3000/api/rotinas/recomendadas?usuarioId=cd4424cb-d137-421d-a7da-73e883841695 status=200, reason=OK headers={'X-Powered-By': 'Express', 'Access-Control-Allow-Origin': '*', 'Content-Type': 'application/json; charset=utf-8', 'Content-Length': '403', 'ETag': 'W/"193-9Iy2BNIF5aDa3lx+GjreQ0fYsfo"', 'Date': 'Thu, 18 Jun 2026 00:53:53 GMT', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Keep-Alive': 'timeout=5'} body=[{"id":"8d3f9394-319d-43d6-af00-e8296038a794","nome":"superior 1","duracao_total":15,"perfil_alvo":"ATIVO_LEVE","data_criacao":"2026-06-06T23:07:26.960Z","contraindicacoes_exercicios":["ombro","costas"]},{"id":"fe9c6111-f85e-481b-bfb7-0724e52a90b6","nome":"treino de peito","duracao_total":10,"perfil_alvo":"ATIVO_LEVE","data_criacao":"2026-06-06T22:06:14.804Z","contraindicacoes_exercicios":["ombro"]}]
kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Get From List
kw.doc: Returns the value specified with an ``index`` from ``list``.

kw.name: Get From Dictionary
kw.doc: Returns a value from the given ``dictionary`` based on the given ``key``.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

test.name: CT01 - T20: Deve retornar erro ao tentar salvar historico de usuario inexistente

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST On Session
kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Should Not Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are equal after converting them to integers.

test.doc: RF13 / RN07 — Entrada Inválida: ID de usuário inexistente no banco. O backend deve retornar erro ao tentar gravar um histórico associado a um usuário que não existe na tabela usuarios.

test.name: CT02 - T20: Deve registrar o primeiro treino e o historico deve ter exatamente 1 entrada

kw.name: GET On Session
kw.msg: GET Response : url=http://localhost:3000/api/usuarios/cd4424cb-d137-421d-a7da-73e883841695/historico status=200, reason=OK headers={'X-Powered-By': 'Express', 'Access-Control-Allow-Origin': '*', 'Content-Type': 'application/json; charset=utf-8', 'Content-Length': '743', 'ETag': 'W/"2e7-rOXqHSN5LMlER2d36YVOK20u+eM"', 'Date': 'Thu, 18 Jun 2026 00:53:55 GMT', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Keep-Alive': 'timeout=5'} body=[{"id":"c3bbb9b0-5eed-4910-87a1-1c0e9bd16ad6","usuario_id":"cd4424cb-d137-421d-a7da-73e883841695","rotina_id":"8d3f9394-319d-43d6-af00-e8296038a794","percepcao_esforco":null,"data_realizacao":"2026-06-18T03:50:47.088Z","rotina_nome":"superior 1"},{"id":"0a05d7f3-82d3-44b1-a361-b451b6f4c068","usuario_id":"cd4424cb-d137-421d-a7da-73e883841695","rotina_id":"8d3f9394-319d-43d6-af00-e8296038a794","percepcao_esforco":"","data_realizacao":"2026-06-18T03:50:46.932Z","rotina_nome":"superior 1"},{"id":"89089ca6-c8e8-4fbb-8005-6c46ff83f93a","usuario_id":"cd4424cb-d137-421d-a7da-73e883841695","rotina_id":"8d3f9394-319d-43d6-af00-e8296038a794","percepcao_esforco":"MODERADO","data_realizacao":"2026-06-18T03:50:14.196Z","rotina_nome":"superior 1"}]
kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Get Length
kw.doc: Returns and logs the length of the given item as an integer.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST On Session
kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.name: GET On Session
kw.msg: GET Response : url=http://localhost:3000/api/usuarios/cd4424cb-d137-421d-a7da-73e883841695/historico status=200, reason=OK headers={'X-Powered-By': 'Express', 'Access-Control-Allow-Origin': '*', 'Content-Type': 'application/json; charset=utf-8', 'Content-Length': '995', 'ETag': 'W/"3e3-TSEPbU3MhU5tyh6CF+c5AVhlhco"', 'Date': 'Thu, 18 Jun 2026 00:53:55 GMT', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Keep-Alive': 'timeout=5'} body=[{"id":"80fe8bdf-8987-40da-909a-80bd793cb7f4","usuario_id":"cd4424cb-d137-421d-a7da-73e883841695","rotina_id":"8d3f9394-319d-43d6-af00-e8296038a794","percepcao_esforco":"MODERADO","data_realizacao":"2026-06-18T03:51:26.308Z","rotina_nome":"superior 1"},{"id":"c3bbb9b0-5eed-4910-87a1-1c0e9bd16ad6","usuario_id":"cd4424cb-d137-421d-a7da-73e883841695","rotina_id":"8d3f9394-319d-43d6-af00-e8296038a794","percepcao_esforco":null,"data_realizacao":"2026-06-18T03:50:47.088Z","rotina_nome":"superior 1"},{"id":"0a05d7f3-82d3-44b1-a361-b451b6f4c068","usuario_id":"cd4424cb-d137-421d-a7da-73e883841695","rotina_id":"8d3f9394-319d-43d6-af00-e8296038a794","percepcao_esforco":"","data_realizacao":"2026-06-18T03:50:46.932Z","rotina_nome":"superior 1"},{"id":"89089ca6-c8e8-4fbb-8005-6c46ff83f93a","usuario_id":"cd4424cb-d137-421d-a7da-73e883841695","rotina_id":"8d3f9394-319d-43d6-af00-e8296038a794","percepcao_esforco":"MODERADO","data_realizacao":"2026-06-18T03:50:14.196Z","rotina_nome":"superior 1"}]
kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Get Length
kw.doc: Returns and logs the length of the given item as an integer.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

test.doc: RF13 / RN07 — Entrada Válida: Usuário completa o primeiro treino do dia. O contador deve passar de 0 para 1 (uma entrada no histórico).

kw.name: Delete All Sessions
kw.doc: Removes all the session objects
